PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

JONATHAN W. NIGHTINGALE, Esq., for John Cowan, Objector.

Douglass Voorsanger, Esq., for Stephen Anderson, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers oral argument regarding the venue issue. Mr. Nightengale reports of filing a will contest but wishes to wait until the venue issue is resolved.

After additional discussion, the court takes only the venue issue under submission. The Petition for Probate of Will is continued to Nov-15-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.
